results.rendered_html:
sam-ave (-ava- √5. i) P. -avaiti, to come or meet or mix or assemble together, be united in (acc.),  ŚBr. ;  Śaṃk.  (cf.  Pāṇ. iv, 4, 43 );
to regard, consider (with iva, ‘to regard as’),  VP.

results.rendered_html:
samave 2 P.
1 To assemble, come together; samavetā yuyutsavaḥ  Bg. 1. 1. 
2 To be related or connected in an intimate relation.
